candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current assets component, not the total.
Combined/misparsed label and not a clean current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as requested.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term interest-bearing debt; lease liabilities are shown separately, so this is the preferred STD line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt excluding Capital Leases
candidates.why: Valid component of STD, but likely included within current interest-bearing liabilities; using both would risk double counting.
Possible STD component if no clean total existed, but likely included in current interest-bearing liabilities in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Supplemental component of current debt, but less complete than the clean total current interest-bearing liabilities line.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because it is a cleaner reported total for current debt. Lease liabilities are presented separately ('Current lease liabilities'), so this best matches baseline STD excluding leases.

candidates.why: Exact match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Clean reported PPE line; preferred over gross/accumulated depreciation components.
Gross PPE total, but net/clean PPE line exists and is preferred.

variables.notes: Preferred the clean PPE line over gross or balancing/component rows.

candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital Cash flow from changes in working capital
candidates.why: Misparsed/combined line, not the final net operating cash flow total.

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities line.
